title: Placement Helper
description: Adjusts client-side block placement for smoother building in singleplayer and creative.
body:
# Placement Helper

**Function:**
Removes the block placement cooldown in Minecraft, allowing blocks to be placed continuously while holding the placement key.

**Benefits:**

* Speeds up building in singleplayer and creative mode.
* Makes repetitive or large-scale construction smoother and more convenient.
* Toggle the feature on or off anytime using a customizable hotkey.

**Multiplayer Notice:**
Only use on multiplayer servers if allowed by the server rules.

**Support & Follow:**
Follow me on Modrinth and give the repository a star on GitHub:
[My GitHub Account](https://github.com/therohero)
[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/therohero/no-place-cooldown)
